name: Should I optimize my homepage, FAQ page, or location page for Siri first?
description: Start with the page that can answer the target question most clearly and accurately.

mainEntity.name: Should I optimize my homepage, FAQ page, or location page for Siri first?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should compare clarity, authority, and maintenance effort. A short, accurate page that gets updated regularly is usually more useful than a long page with broad claims. For local businesses, compare how consistently each option presents the same business facts across the web.
acceptedAnswer.description: Start with the page that can answer the target question most clearly and accurately.
